Tonight's Pick— changes daily
CS9.2
2022

The Quiet Girl

Colm Bairéad

🏆Nominated Academy Award Best International Feature Film

A shy, overlooked nine-year-old girl is sent to spend the summer with a distant relative couple in rural Ireland. She is, for the first time, treated gently.

quiet isolationView film →
